prompt: A sprawling, intricate underwater landscape that resembles a crumbling, bone-white ruined city made of calcium and ash. The scene is overwhelmingly monochrome and skeletal, stretching into the murky distance. In the very bottom corner, a single, tiny, fiercely glowing neon-pink coral structure stands out against the vast dead expanse. Cinematic lighting, macro photography style, deep ocean shadows, melancholic and haunting atmosphere, no text, no charts.
insight: Massive ocean heatwaves are turning the vibrant architecture of our coral reefs into vast, silent boneyards.
